description: Evaluates policy and compliance management maturity—reference frameworks, rule lifecycle, compliance scanning, hardening alignment, SOC monitoring, and AI-era governance.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: Policy and compliance management services exist and are reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Policy and compliance management services exist

capabilities.name: Reference framework and standards alignment
capabilities.description: A reference policy framework and standards/regulations alignment provide enterprise-wide visibility and compliance scope reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Official documentation of relevant standards and regulations
DORA and financial-sector ICT compliance obligations mapped where applicable
EU AI Act and AI system compliance obligations mapped where applicable

capabilities.name: KPIs, KRIs, and compliance metrics
capabilities.description: Policy and compliance KPIs, KRIs, and metrics—including drift, exceptions, and remediation velocity—are documented and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Rule deployment success and rollback metrics
Officially designed and documented compliance metrics
Control coverage and scan pass rate metrics
Mean time to remediate compliance findings

capabilities.name: Policy and compliance platforms
capabilities.description: Rule management and compliance scanning platforms support automation, policy-as-code, and enterprise-wide scanning with quarterly configuration review.
evaluation_focus: Compliance management software for enterprise-wide monitoring
Automated compliance scanning across all assets and locations
Software configuration reviewed at least quarterly to align with business
Scan results integrated with remediation and decision points

capabilities.name: Policy and compliance processes
capabilities.description: Rule lifecycle and compliance management processes are documented, automated where possible, and reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Documented rule creation and modification process
Documented rule deletion and deprovisioning process

capabilities.name: Policy and compliance teams
capabilities.description: Policy and compliance teams are centralized or clearly defined with documented hierarchy and separation of duties.
evaluation_focus: Formalized team composition and separation of duties
Compliance management teams manage the overall service
Policy and compliance specialists on compliance teams

capabilities.name: Software-defined and context-based policies
capabilities.description: Software-defined and context-based domain policies are maintained, deployed programmatically, and validated at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Context-based network access control vs IP-only policies
Context-based authorization and guest policies enterprise-wide
Classification and context-based data access policies enterprise-wide
Quarterly review of domain context-based policies

capabilities.name: Policy and compliance change monitoring
capabilities.description: Policy and compliance changes are monitored and logged to the SOC with quarterly review.
evaluation_focus: Documented process for transporting compliance changes to the SOC
Secure transport of compliance changes to the SOC
Dynamic compliance changes captured and transferred to the SOC
Anomalous compliance drift or bulk exemption detection

capabilities.name: Asset hardening and posture compliance
capabilities.description: Endpoint posture and asset hardening policies align with compliance requirements including automated patching where possible.
evaluation_focus: Policy scope across devices and locations
Application hardening process and coverage across SDLC
Endpoint and device hardening aligned to compliance
Network asset hardening process and automation

capabilities.name: AI-era policy and compliance governance
capabilities.description: Policy and compliance governance accounts for AI adoption, dual-use model risk, and automated control validation.
evaluation_focus: Approved versus shadow AI tool policy boundaries
Data handling and retention policies for AI systems
Delegated agent action policies aligned to EU AI Act risk tiers
AI system inventory and risk classification for compliance
EU AI Act conformity and documentation obligations tracked
AI vendor and third-party model compliance monitoring

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
